user_message: I have this exec meeting notes from Litware Inc that needs generate the watchlist. Manager is asking for an update today.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Litware Inc: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

required_artifacts: ECIF workscope draft with measurable deliverables

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF21-H trap (ECIF workscope template doesn't integrate with opportunity record natively); produces complete ECIF workscope draft with measurable deliverables, qualified partner, effort estimate, eligibility c
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF21-H failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF21-H failure mode (ECIF workscope template doesn't integrate with opportunity record natively)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF21-H -- ECIF workscope template doesn't integrate with opportunity record natively
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
